_comment: Defect taxonomy — populated by scripts/scan-defects.ts and human triage
_instructions: Each defect is a specific, binary production risk. Priority: P0 (blocks deploy) > P1 (must fix) > P2 (should fix) > P3 (nice to have)

defect_schema.description: fetch() call to external API has no try/catch — unhandled rejection crashes the process
